name: Elevance Health, Inc.
summary: PART I . General Elevance Health and its direct and indirect subsidiaries, referred to throughout this document as we, us, our, the Company or Elevance Health, is a leading health company bringing together the concepts of elevate and advance. We are focused on enhancing well-being and advancing health outcomes by delivering integrated, whole health solutions across the care journey. We support consumers throughout their full health journeys with medical, pharmacy, and behavioral health services ...
